title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, offered through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School. The course includes content on artificial intelligence taught by instructors including Brian Yu and David J. Malan.
writeup: This CS50 video is a behind-the-scenes look at the first chapter, "Playing," of Harvard University's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence taught by Brian Yu. It situates the AI material within CS50, Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming, which reaches students through edX, the Harvard Extension School, and the Harvard Summer School. The AI content is delivered by instructors including Brian Yu and David J. Malan.
